roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DEF ATC TO RECALL BENCH WARRANT ISSUED 02/18/15, FILED
ASST DIST ATTNY MOT TO JOIN 14020797 FILED TODAY

/AJW/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 38D/CTS 38/WS/DNACOMP/IND/WS/11590/DTC/LFNEW/RX/F4:300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A DRUG PROGRAM FEE BASE FINE OF $150 PLUS $450 IN PENALTIES AND ASSESSMENTS FOR A TOTAL OF $600 PURSUANT TO HS 11372,7,/X: OBEY-STAY AWAY IN EFFECT - 150 YARDS FROM THE INTERSECTION OF EDDY AND VAN NESSAVESF,CA/X: THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A BASE FINE OF $500 PLUS $1500 IN ASSESSMENTS FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $2000,/X:DETERMINATION OF FORFIETURE/DOP/
